title: Confluence PBR
description: An expansion package added PBR effects to Confluence:Otherworld mod
body:
![Confluence PBR By Joeylth](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/07c9f7a774e9d3171698fa4d0daf7943239707f9.jpeg)

**大型汇流来世PBR材质拓展包**，为[汇流来世](https://www.mcmod.cn/class/18650.html)的材质纹理带来颠覆性的视觉效果提升，你可以在这里看到有真实光泽质感的矿石，充满立体感的自然方块等。所有PBR内容需要搭配支持LabPBR标准的光影，最推荐的光影是[Sundial-Lite](https://github.com/GeForceLegend/Sundial-Lite)

**A great PBR expansion pack** for [Confluence:Otherworld](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/confluence) mod,brought a game-changing upgrade for its texture.Natural blocks with real luster and voxel style could be seen here.To experience this resource pack,you need a shader support LabPBR standard,the most recommend shader is [Sundial-Lite](https://github.com/GeForceLegend/Sundial-Lite)
